approval_scope: Approved within the tested dashboard scope: visual inspection of the 44 commit-bound screenshots; automated keyboard, focus, axe, semantic, responsive-overflow, provenance and prohibited-content checks across the declared browser matrix. This approval is not a universal accessibility or WCAG-conformance claim. An independent manual VoiceOver session was not performed.
findings: The analysis detail page initially exposed a machine slug as its reader-facing heading; commit 345576a replaced it with the catalogue title and the full browser matrix passed.
No clipping, page-level horizontal overflow, restricted raw content, secret-like values or provenance mismatch remained in the reviewed packet.
Independent manual VoiceOver testing was not performed and is excluded from this bounded approval.
remediation_or_waiver: The machine-slug heading was remediated before approval. Manual VoiceOver remains an explicitly documented scope limitation rather than a claim of conformance.

assistive_technology: Playwright keyboard and semantic accessibility assertions
